name: Morning Briefing
description: Daily briefing with weather, calendar, and news delivered every morning

data.label: Weather
data.config:
LOCATION=$(curl -s "http://ip-api.com/json" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['lat'], d['lon'])")
LAT=$(echo $LOCATION | awk '{print $1}'); LON=$(echo $LOCATION | awk '{print $2}')
curl -s -A "nanoclaw/1.0" "https://api.met.no/weatherapi/locationforecast/2.0/compact?lat=$LAT&lon=$LON" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
timeseries = d['properties']['timeseries']
now = timeseries[0]['data']['instant']['details']
print(f\"Temperature: {now['air_temperature']}°C\")
print(f\"Wind: {now['wind_speed']} m/s\")
"

data.label: Briefing Writer
data.systemPrompt: You write a concise, friendly morning briefing. Use the weather data from the tool. Keep it short — 3-5 sentences. Start with a greeting and today's date. Mention the weather and anything notable. Sign off with a motivating one-liner.
